name: strugie
description: Underrated on the outside, absolutely dialed on the inside. Built to be the reliable closer when matches get weird.

stack.title: Drive
stack.body: 6-wheel drop center West Coast with blue nitrile and brushless drive.

stack.title: Scoring Arm
stack.body: Two-stage carbon tube cascade with low-drag cable runs and thrust bearings.

stack.title: Vision
stack.body: Jetson co-processor running AprilTags into Photon for fast pose solves.

stack.title: Controls
stack.body: Driver profiles, current limiting, and accel curves for repeatable arcs.

timeline.title: Kickoff sketch
timeline.detail: Paper napkin layout wins the vote.

timeline.title: Drive V1
timeline.detail: First chassis rolls; chain rub fixed with spacers.

timeline.title: Arm sprint
timeline.detail: Thrust stack removes backlash; arm smooth.

timeline.title: Comp 1
timeline.detail: Ranked 3rd; mid-cycle auto hits every run.

timeline.title: Overhaul
timeline.detail: Carbon cross brace drops 1.2 lbs, gains stiffness.

plays.title: Auto: Center Spike
plays.detail: Tag align, pickup preload, score mid, park.

plays.title: Auto: Wing Sweep
plays.detail: Slide right, sweep 2 samples, drop to L2.

plays.title: TeleOp: Feed & Fade
plays.detail: Intake near HP, drift to center drop zones.

plays.title: Endgame: Snap Hang
plays.detail: Latch, extend, current-limited winch to bar.

plays.title: Debug: Safe Mode
plays.detail: Caps velocity at 60% for rough fields.

notes: Bring spare thrust bearings and wipe lenses between matches.
